MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF INVESTMENT PARTNERSHIP (2006) LP's MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Erica Goldman's unopposed pro hac vice application is granted.

Order signed.
